name: Application Header
notes: Header is rendered only when AuthContext.isAuthenticated is true; unauthenticated users are shown LoginForm instead (App.jsx:80-82). The Header itself contains no auth logic.
Navigation is click-handler-based with no React Router — clicking a nav item calls the onNavigate callback prop which sets App.state.activeSection; the URL does not change.

Header exposes three nav targets (documents, upload, search); the Sidebar additionally exposes 'tags', which is absent from the Header. The Header applies no active-state styling to its nav links — all three <span> elements look identical regardless of activeSection.

activeSection changes are visual-only in the legacy app: DocumentGrid is always rendered regardless of activeSection. The 'upload' nav link highlights Sidebar only; no dedicated upload panel is mounted.
